---
title: "REMLResult"
generated: true
description: "Per-voxel REML fit output."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.lme.reml`](../nitrix-stats-lme-reml.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:REMLResult -->
```python
class REMLResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:REMLResult -->
Per-voxel REML fit output.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:REMLResult.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(theta_hat: Float[Array, 'V 2'], beta_hat: Float[Array, 'V p'], log_lik: Float[Array, 'V'], fixed_cov: Float[Array, 'V p p'], theta_cov: Float[Array, 'V 2 2'], grad_m: Float[Array, 'V 2 p p'], blups: Optional[Float[Array, 'V q']] = None) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:REMLResult -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `2` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
